productDisplayName: Mark Taylor Men Black Printed T-shirt
description: Composition Black round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed neckline, short sleeves and graphic print on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub, bleach or iron directly on print/embroidery Drip dry Warm iron For urban cool, wear this printed mark taylor T-shirt. Perfect for styling under sweaters or jackets, this off-duty essential is stylish enough to build your look around. Wear this with your favourite shorts and shoes from quiksilver. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
